name: WinVest Acquisition Corp.
business: WinVest Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed under the laws of the State of Delaware on March 1, 2021, for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing date, the company has not completed an initial business combination.

exposures.sentence: Our search was initially focused on creating a scalable digital financial media and investing platform.
